compiled_state.title: Agent uses incorrect ticket CLI syntax not found in reference docs — guesses erroneous flags
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
During sprint execution, the agent used CLI syntax it hallucinated rather than reading the authoritative reference documentation:
- Used `--parent=328f-90eb` (no such option)
- Used `--filter-parent 328f-90eb` (no such option)

Both triggered 'Error: unknown option' and produced no useful output.

## Expected Behavior
The agent should read `plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md` (listed in CLAUDE.md) before issuing any ticket CLI commands and use only documented syntax. All valid subcommands and options are explicitly listed there.

## Root Cause
The agent guessed likely-looking flags (`--parent`, `--filter-parent`) based on convention without consulting the reference. The reference doc is already listed in CLAUDE.md ('Ticket system v3 (event-sourced): ... CLI: .claude/scripts/dso ticket <subcommand> (ref: plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md)').

## Fix
Before issuing any `.claude/scripts/dso ticket` command, read `plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md` or run `.claude/scripts/dso ticket --help` to verify the correct syntax. Never guess flag names.
